content.problemStatement: Write a C program to find the sum of two given numbers, 4 and 8. The program should compute the sum and display the result as output.
content.inputFormat: First line contains T, the number of test cases. Each test case contains no additional input.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the sum of 4 and 8 (which is 12) on a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There is a single test case, so the program prints 12 once.
Two test cases require printing 12 on two separate lines.
Three test cases result in three lines, each containing 12.

solution.approach: The required sum is constant (4 + 8 = 12). For each test case we simply output 12. The algorithm reads the integer T and repeats printing 12 exactly T times. This runs in O(T) time and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total, where T is the number of test cases.
